Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- email: testuser@example.com
- password: Test1234
- username: TestUser
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, password, and username.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the homepage.

Title: City View
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Select a city from the list.
3. Verify that the city details are displayed.
Expected Result: The city details are correctly displayed.

Title: Create Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the city view page.
Test Data:
- titolo: Test Event
- data: 2023-01-01
- tipologia: Party
- creatore: TestUser
- città: TestCity
- descrizione: Test Event Description
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down to the "Add Event" section.
2. Enter the event details.
3. Click the "Add Event" button.
Expected Result: The event is successfully created and displayed on the city view page.

Title: Edit Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the city view page.
Test Data:
- titolo: Updated Test Event
- data: 2023-01-02
- tipologia: Concert
- creatore: TestUser
- città: TestCity
- descrizione: Updated Test Event Description
Test Steps:
1. Find the event to be edited.
2. Click the "Edit" button next to the event.
3. Update the event details.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The event is successfully updated and displayed on the city view page.

Title: Delete Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the city view page.
Test Steps:
1. Find the event to be deleted.
2. Click the "Delete" button next to the event.
3. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: The event is successfully deleted and no longer displayed on the city view page.

Title: Search City
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Enter "Rome" in the search bar.
3. Click the "Search" button.
Expected Result: The city named "Rome" is displayed on the city view page.

Title: View POI
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the city view page.
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the city has associated points of interest.
2. Click on a point of interest.
3. Verify that the point of interest details are displayed.
Expected Result: The point of interest details are correctly displayed.
